"focused": false, "selected": false, "scrollable-vertical": false, "children": [{"text": "Version 2.4.13 news:
- Fix video issues


Follow @ISSonLive on Twitter to get news about App, Cameras & ISS before anybody. 

About video stream: 

-Black/Blue Image = International Space Station (ISS) is on the night side of the Earth. 
Sometimes video is not available by ISS transmission problems. Be patient, in few minutes the transmission will return. 

If map don't show the position of the ISS correctly, please check that date, time and timezone of your phone are configured correctly. 

Notes: 

ISS onLive is compatible with ChromeCast. You can send the video that you are watching in your device to your TV. 

You can remove the ads using inapp purchasing option (Google Play icon in action bar). 

Double tapping the video you can change to fullscreen video view. 

If you have any problem, please contact me at david@polilabs.com ", "resource-id": "android:id/message", "adapter-view": false, "pointer": "b6f71fa", "scrollable-horizontal": false, "ancestors":
